rows.notes: Top-of-page title/header. Handwriting of a few letters is indistinct (especially the last word: 'pmi' is my best visual match). No amounts on this line.

Amounts columns aligned with vertical rules. Pounds column blank/zero, shillings clearly '9', pence '8' with small quarter-farthing/quarter mark visible (interpreted as 0.25). Description is legible; small uncertainty in final abbreviation 'L: Tew'.
Pounds '1', shillings '10' and pence '5' with a clear halfpenny loop ('ob') interpreted as 0.5. Surname 'Fearey/Ferrey' reading uncertain from handwriting; chosen 'Fearey' as closest visual match.
Pounds column blank/zero, shillings '11' clear. Pence shows '6' with a halfpenny loop (interpreted as 0.5). Description and initials legible.
Shillings '2' and pence '3' with halfpenny sign (0.5). Surname 'Barnwells' readable; small flourish but unambiguous.
Pounds '3', shillings '9' clear. Pence '2' with a small quarter mark (interpreted as 0.25). 'Do' = ditto; description is clear.
Pounds '2', shillings '6' clear. Pence looks like '1' with a '3q' style mark (three‑farthings) interpreted as 0.75. Place-name spelling uncertain; 'Trethewin' is my best reading of the handwriting.
Pounds '1', shillings '18' clearly written. Pence '5' with halfpenny loop (0.5). Description readable.
Pounds '3', shillings '6', pence '3' with halfpenny 'ob' sign. 'Ann Becks' legible.
Subtotal line across the entries above. Numerals are aligned with the vertical ruling lines and the pence shows a clear quarter sign (0.25).
Clear centered section header 'Soluta varia'. No amounts on this line.

rows.description: To Mr Townsend for work done in bringing a New Pipe of the Hincksey water to supply the Kitchen as by Bill
rows.notes: Description long but legible. Amount aligns to columns: pounds '2', shillings '14', pence '10' (no fraction).

rows.description: To 877l.10s.3d in 3 per Cent Cons. at 6 8¼ per Ct.
rows.notes: This line describes purchase/conversion; amount '598.18.0' aligned in the money columns. The interest/rate notation '6 8¼' is legible but slightly cramped, so confidence lowered for that part.
Commission line is on its own row with amount clearly '1.2.0'. Text and numbers are distinct.
Bracketed subtotal/result of the two preceding lines (598.18.0 + 1.2.0 = 600.0.0). The brace is present on the page; amount '600.0.0' is clear and aligned.
Name and trade legible. Amount columns show '12.2.0' clearly.
Description 'Mr Bush as by Bill' readable. Amount '10.4.3' clear in columns.

rows.description: To Mr Davis & Mrs Hemming on Acct of Acton
rows.notes: Shillings read as '4' and pence '0'. The names 'Davis & Mrs Hemming' are legible though spacing is tight; 'Acton' reading of the place is my best interpretation from the handwriting.

rows.description: Allowed J Hartley inclosing extra Expences & L: Tew
rows.notes: Amount '5.18.8' clear. Word 'inclosing' and 'Expences' spelled in period form; 'L: Tew' abbreviation appears again. Minor uncertainty in exact punctuation but meaning clear.

rows.description: To Mr Davis Bill as Exhib'r & Libr'n for 2 years
rows.notes: Amount '6.6.0' clear and aligned. Abbreviations 'Exhib'r' and 'Libr'n' appear in the original; interpreted literally.
Single short line 'St Thomas' appears beneath previous entry with no separate amount in the money columns; likely a sub-note or place reference. No amounts visible for this row.

rows.description: Allowed B: Gardiner Inclosing Expenses for the Tenement formerly Cives now Renewed
rows.notes: Amount '10.0.0' clear at right. Long description readable though a few words ('Cives') are old spelling; transcription follows the manuscript.

rows.description: Watchman of St Michl Parish & Lamphighters
rows.notes: Amount '0.3.6' clearly aligned. 'St Michl' abbreviation (Michael) and 'Lamphighters' legible. Minor abbreviation but unambiguous.
Amount '3.8.7' clear. Description abbreviated as on page ('Fruits Acct').

rows.description: College Sub. to the Radcliff Infirmary for 96
rows.notes: Amount '5.5.0' clear. 'Radcliff Infirmary' reading is pretty clear; final 'for 96' appears on the page and is transcribed literally.

rows.description: Tho: Dodd for Lamplighting for a Year
rows.notes: Amount '4.16.6' legible. Abbreviation 'Tho:' for Thomas clear. Handwriting of 'Lamplighting' slightly contracted but readable.

rows.description: Mr Taunton's Bill for Law Charges at Kidder
rows.notes: Amount '13.4.10' clear. Surname 'Taunton' and 'Kidder' (probably Kidderminster or Kidderminster abbreviated) read from the manuscript; location truncated on page so there is mild uncertainty.
Bottom-right running total '674.8.2' (carried over). Numerals are clear though the word 'Car. Over' is abbreviated; amount columns align with ruling lines.
